drafted_reply: Dear Customer, We sincerely apologize for the delay with your order #10492 and the lack of a tracking link. We understand your frustration, especially after two weeks. We are escalating this immediately to our shipping team to investigate the status of your order. A representative will contact you shortly with an update and further details. Thank you for your patience.

Dear Customer, We sincerely apologize for the incredibly frustrating experience you encountered with our app crashing and the subsequent double charge. We understand how upsetting this situation is and are taking your concern very seriously. We are immediately investigating the technical issue and processing a full refund for the duplicate charge. You will receive a separate email confirmation once the refund has been successfully processed, which typically takes 3-5 business days to reflect on your statement. We appreciate you bringing this to our attention and are committed to resolving this for you as quickly as possible.

Thank you for reaching out regarding our enterprise pricing plans. Yes, we do offer a discount for customers who opt for yearly billing instead of monthly subscription cycles. For specific details on the discounts available and to discuss which plan best suits your needs, please visit our dedicated enterprise pricing page on our website or contact our sales team directly.
